coverage_note: The bundled GCK population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from GCK glucose phosphorylation, beta-cell glucose sensing, hepatic glycogen synthesis, MODY biology, and congenital hyperinsulinism context and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000106633: GCK coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: GCK findings should be read against glucose phosphorylation, beta-cell glucose sensing, hepatic glycogen synthesis, MODY biology, and congenital hyperinsulinism context; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.
GCK MODY2 loss-of-function model is curated as a GCK marker for GCK-MODY review context, Beta-cell glucose sensing; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
GCK activating hyperinsulinism model is curated as a GCK marker for GCK-MODY review context, Beta-cell glucose sensing; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
